action.reasoning: Observation: val_bal_acc reaches ~0.864 but test balanced_accuracy stuck at best of 0.5657 (iter2); rare classes (bird/squirrel/bobcat) remain unstable (0.03-0.85 range). Curves show strong source convergence but large DG gap persists. Milder augs in recent runs still not enough. Time critically low (~23min left). Analysis: Current augs (blur/grayscale/rotation/high-mag RandAugment/jitter) likely hurt transfer to L100's lighting/backgrounds; regularization insufficient to prevent source overfitting on rare classes despite sampler+LS. CLIP-ViT backbone is solid. Decision: Incrementally edit for milder augs (mag=5, remove blur/gray/rot, lower jitter), stronger reg (drop_rate=0.2, drop_path=0.2, wd=0.1, lr=1e-5), epochs=12 (to fit time), update model.py for drop_path param. Keep sampler+LS+val_bal selection+TTA. Train then submit_eval for potential gain within budget.
